title: Mountview Primary School: Guiding each child’s developmental journey
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to announce...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to announce that George Pre-primary School - Mountview has been nominated for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards in the category Education, Lessons & Coaching: Best Pre-Primary School.


> This incredible honour, driven by the support of our community, celebrates the nurturing foundation and quality education we proudly offer.


At Mountview, we inspire a lifelong love of learning by creating a joyful, secure environment where young minds can flourish. With passionate educators, modern facilities, and a dynamic curriculum, we guide each child’s developmental journey through play-based learning, outdoor exploration, and essential early skills in literacy and numeracy.

Help us win 'Best of George'! We invite you to be part of this special moment. Cast your vote for George Pre-Primary School - Mountview and help us shine a light on our wonderful school community.

Please vote for us on https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ before 17 July 2025.

Follow us on Facebook.

Your support brings us closer to earning this meaningful recognition.

Thank you for believing in our mission and for growing with us every step of the way!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
